movie.actors: Brad Johnson, Marjean Holden, Gerrit Graham, John Christian Graas
movie.plot: David Herdeg's participation in a failed 1943 experiment in radar invisibility has propelled him 40 years into the future. An aberration in his genetic makeup enabled him to pass through ...
movie.title: Philadelphia Experiment II
movie.writer: Wallace C. Bennett (characters), Don Jakoby (characters), Kim Steven Ketelsen (story), Kevin Rock (story), Kevin Rock (screenplay), Nick Paine (screenplay)
